name: suews
description: Run, validate, and analyse SUEWS urban climate simulations from your AI assistant. Bundles the `suews-mcp` MCP server alongside SUEWS workflow skills, including fresh-site simulation with assumption ledgers and readiness levels.

interface.longDescription: SUEWS (Surface Urban Energy and Water Balance Scheme) is a neighbourhood-scale urban land-surface model. This plugin gives your AI assistant the workflow rules, fresh-site simulation guidance, assumption-ledger discipline, forcing-data checks, output interpretation guidance, and common-error diagnostics needed to run, validate, and analyse SUEWS simulations.
interface.developerName: UMEP-dev (UCL Department of Risk and Disaster Reduction)
defaultPrompt: Set up a first SUEWS simulation for a new site and show every assumption
Diagnose why my SUEWS run produced unrealistic outputs
Help me migrate a legacy namelist input to YAML
